2603.16659.title: Machines acquire scientific taste from institutional traces
2603.16659.paper_summary: Artificial intelligence matches or exceeds human performance on tasks with verifiable answers, from protein folding to Olympiad mathematics. Yet the capacity that most governs scientific advance is not reasoning but taste: the ability to judge which untested ideas deserve pursuit, exercised daily by editors and funders but never successfully articulated, taught, or automated. Here we show that fine-tuning language models on journal publication decisions recovers evaluative judgment inaccessible to both frontier models and human expertise. Using a held-out benchmark of research pitches in management spanning four quality tiers, we find that eleven frontier models, spanning major proprietary and open architectures, barely exceed chance, averaging 31% accuracy. Panels of journal editors and editorial board members reach 42% by majority vote. Fine-tuned models trained on years of publication records each surpass every frontier model and expert panel, with the best single model achieving 59%. These models exhibit calibrated confidence, reaching 100% accuracy on their highest-confidence predictions, and transfer this evaluative signal to untrained pairwise comparisons and one-sentence summaries. The mechanism generalizes: models trained on economics publication records achieve 70% accuracy. Scientific taste was not missing from AI's reach; it was deposited in the institutional record, waiting to be extracted. These results provide a scalable mechanism to triage the expanding volume of scientific production across disciplines where quality resists formal verification.
2603.16659.paper_summary_zh: 人工智慧在可驗證答案的任務上達到或超越人類表現，從蛋白質摺疊到奧林匹克數學。然而，最主導科學進展的能力不是推理，而是品味：判斷哪些未經測試的想法值得追求的能力，這是編輯和資助者每天都在運用的，但從未成功地表達、教授或自動化。在這裡，我們展示了在期刊出版決策上微調語言模型能夠恢復評估判斷，這是前沿模型和人類專業知識無法獲得的。使用一個涵蓋四個質量層級的管理研究提案的保留基準，我們發現十一個前沿模型，涵蓋主要的專有和開放架構，幾乎僅僅超過隨機機率，平均準確率為31%。期刊編輯和編輯委員會成員的投票達到42%。經過多年出版記錄訓練的微調模型每一個都超越了每個前沿模型和專家小組，其中最佳單一模型達到59%。這些模型展現出經過校準的信心，在其最高信心的預測中達到100%的準確率，並將這種評估信號轉移到未經訓練的成對比較和一句話摘要中。這一機制具有普遍性：基於經濟學出版記錄訓練的模型達到70%的準確率。科學品味並不是AI無法觸及的；它被存放在制度記錄中，等待被提取。這些結果提供了一種可擴展的機制，以篩選在質量抵抗正式驗證的學科中不斷增長的科學產出量。
2603.16659.author: Ziqin Gong et.al.
2603.16659.authors: Ziqin Gong, Ning Li, Huaikang Zhou
